contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 90
- Description: Phase 4.1 — pending Scored Chatlogs cron + freshness layer live
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/lineage-engine/pull/13
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/lineage-credentials/pull/13
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/126
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_prod/pull/9
  
  Details:
  Shipped Phase 4.1 of the credentialing freshness work — the credential page now surfaces submitted-but-unreviewed contributions from Scored Chatlogs as a 'Recent activity (pending review)' section, on a 6h cron so newly-submitted claims appear within hours instead of waiting for the quarterly Ledger history roll-up.
  
  Four PRs across three repos, all squash-merged:
  
  1. lineage-engine#13 (5a5aa18) — new scripts/fetch_pending_chatlogs.py + build_cv_cache.py integration. Reads Scored Chatlogs tab, filters where col L (Main Ledger Row Number) is empty so dedup against Ledger history is owned by the existing operator GAS — no fuzzy matching, no double-counting. Attaches cv['pending_contributions'] keyed by Contributor Name = display_name. Live test against real sheet: 3,664 pending across 533 contributors, 2,721 settled rows correctly skipped.
  
  2. lineage-credentials#13 (5a5eeeb) — build-cv-cache.yml gets a cron 0 every 6h schedule + a 'Materialize Google credentials' step that reads LINEAGE_GOOGLE_CREDENTIALS_JSON secret to /tmp/google_creds.json and exports GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS. When the secret isn't set the build still runs, just degrades silently (pending sections stay empty; canonical rendering unaffected).
  
  3. truesight_me_beta#126 (1fdd8d0) + truesight_me_prod#9 (a72e001) — credentials/index.html renders the new section conditionally on entries.length > 0, between DAO Contributions and the per-program practice sections. Visual treatment per §18.4: warm-amber 'pending review' pill, caveat banner with floor-date '2024-12-13' and source link, per-entry 'X TDG provisional' badge that's visually distinct from recognized TDG. PDF path is unchanged — Phase 3b doctrine preserved (printables stay canonical-only).
  
  Operator follow-up to fully activate (one-time):
    Add the LINEAGE_GOOGLE_CREDENTIALS_JSON secret to the lineage-credentials repo (org-level works too). The service-account JSON already in market_research's google_credentials.json has read access to both spreadsheets — that's the path of least resistance.
    Once the secret is set, the next cron tick (within 6h) will rebuild and your credential page will start showing those 1,090 pending claims since Dec 2024 that have been invisible to it under the old Ledger-history-only model.
  
  Spec: agentic_ai_context/CREDENTIALING_PROGRAM_PAGES.md §18.
  
  Open for Phase 4.2 / 4.3:
    - Recurring Transactions (column F derivation) — still deferred
    - Per-program filter for pending entries by Project Name fuzzy match — Phase 4.3
    - Name-aliasing for same-person Scored Chatlogs variants ('Gary Teh' vs 'Gary' vs 'Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>') — currently exact-match on display_name; operators can clean up sheet-side or a later sub-phase adds aliases
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 150.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
--------

rubric: 100TDG For every 1 hour of human effort
